events.title: Kraft Werk Picnic @ Mile Square Park (potluck)
events.description:
Potluck Picnic! Bring food/drink to share!
Bring your crafts to work on!

We'll update day of exact park location.
Bring chairs and/or blanket to sit on.
We'll be at the park all day crafting and gothing out.

events.title: Goth Clubbing @ Aráchne Goth Nights

Friday is a holiday!!

Lets get together and stomp stomp.

I recommend you park near Frida Cinema

events.title: Art Walk - Downtown Santa Ana
events.description:
Downtown Santa Ana Art Walk

Meet at 4th St Market at 7PM, come at 6PM if you want preparty or dinner.

Then we do the walk, loop around artist district, and finish the night with drinks/snacks/late dinner.

Park at parking lot right behind 4th St Market.

events.title: Goth Night - The Chamber @ Bravo Night Club Anaheim
events.venue: The Chamber @ Bravo Night Club Anaheim
events.description:
Monday the 26th is a Memorial Day holiday...

That means we RAGE on Sunday night!  Come rage and dance with us.  The Chamber brings darkwave and industrial.  The room next over has cumbia and upstairs is rock en espanol!  Uh..... yeah, were gonna dance in all the rooms duh!

events.title: Goth Clubbing @ Das Bunker - The History of Industrial pt2
events.address: 4067 W Pico Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90019
events.description:
DO YOU LOVE HISTORY??

Come dance with us at Das Bunker. 

"We are inviting back one of the bands we have been working with since our earliest days, Germany's theatrical darkwave pioneers DAS ICH! Filling out this exquisite lineup is the Texan Horror Body Music producer MVTANT and the Das Bunker resident DJs playing music for dancing across three rooms."

Buy tickets before getting there here: https://dasbunker.org/

events.title: World Goth Day @ MainPlace Mall, Santa Ana
events.address: 2800 N Main St, Santa Ana, CA 92705
events.description:
🫵 COME TO MAINPLACE MALL IN SANTA ANA
FRI, MAY 22 6PM

GO TO HOT TOPIC, GET PIERCED, EAT AT FOOD COURT, PLAY ROUND1, WHATEVER HANG OUT

MEET AT FOOD COURT 8PM FOR PHOTOS

events.title: Ghoul's Day Out - MCR fan day event
events.description:
Ghoul's Day Out is a My Chemical Romance fan event located at the church where the music video for Helena was filmed.  There will be lots of vendors, photo ops at the church, live music and cover band, food trucks.

https://www.instagram.com/ghoulsdayoutla

If you want to take photos at the church, you should arrive at around 2PM, because the line takes about an hour.
We'll meet at 4PM near the cover band area and check out the vendors until end time at 6PM.

events.title: Kraft Werks - Making Zip Tie Crowns
events.description:
Come join us and hang out with food, drink and crafting.
Park in the parking lot behind Frida Cinema for ease, there is a fee.
We'll be in the patio area in the back, cant miss us!

I'll bring the supplies:

hair bands
zip ties (black only)
fake black flowers
black gems or sparkly things to attach
black feathers
glue
etc.

You bring:
ideas
conversation
friendly attitude
moneys for food and drink to support the venue
